apps.name: Noir
apps.subtitle: Modular media player
apps.localizedDescription: Noir modular media player with external services.
apps.versionDescription: Fix Miruro hangs where AVPlayer could remain in waiting/paused without hard failure by adding a long startup waiting watchdog fallback, while keeping robust TS-segment playlist rewriting for non-standard provider manifests.

versions.localizedDescription: Fix Miruro hangs where AVPlayer could remain in waiting/paused without hard failure by adding a long startup waiting watchdog fallback, while keeping robust TS-segment playlist rewriting for non-standard provider manifests.
